ValidationRule.description: This checks that the Entry Criteria Formula is provided if the Context Class Name is set
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND ( OR ( ISNEW(), ISCHANGED(EntryCriteriaFormula__c), ISCHANGED(EntryCriteriaContextClassName__c) ), AND ( NOT(ISBLANK(EntryCriteriaContextClassName__c)), ISBLANK(EntryCriteriaFormula__c) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please provide an Entry Criteria for the given Context Class Name
